layout.container: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 py-12 md:py-20
layout.grid_strategy: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-16 items-start

slider.thumb: bg-white border-4 border-zinc-950 h-6 w-6 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)]

input.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-green-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500/20 text-white font-mono text-lg h-14
input.label_style: text-zinc-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 block

card.base: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative

images.usage: Page background with heavy overlay (opacity-10) to add subtle depth without distraction

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' and 'clsx' 'tailwind-merge' if not present.
2. FONTS: Import 'Manrope' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. THEME: Force DARK MODE. The app should feel like a premium fintech tool.
4. LAYOUT: Use a Split Layout. Left side = Inputs (The Control Panel). Right side = Results (The Receipt).
5. LOGIC: Implement the discount logic strictly: 0m=0%, 6m=30%, 9m=40%, 11m=50% off the ESCALATION amount (not the rent).
6. GAMIFICATION: The 'Total Savings' number on the right should be the HERO element. Make it Green (#22c55e) and large (text-5xl).
7. SLIDER: Create a custom slider component that snaps to the 4 specific points (0, 6, 9, 11). Do not allow intermediate values.
8. MOBILE: Stack the panels. Inputs on top, Results sticky at bottom or below inputs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic AI designs. Use 'zinc-950' instead of pure black.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all currency and percentage values to ensure tabular alignment.
Add micro-interactions: When the slider moves, the numbers should transition smoothly (use a counting animation if possible).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Ensure contrast ratios are met. Green text on black is good, but ensure grey text is legible.
